raw.official description: Venom Mine gains 100% increased damage and a second charge, enabling 2 active mines at a time.
Scoped shot hits reduce Grappling Hook's cooldown by up to 4 seconds.
raw.ability details:
* ''Removed in Reign of Talon Season 1''
* Cooldown reduction depends on the charge.

raw.official description: Scoped shots charge 50% faster during Infra-Sight.
Scoped shots cost 3 ammo instead of 5.

* Cannot target through [[barrier]]s.
* Poisoned targets are revealed, similar to regular Venom Mine.

raw.official description: Launch a hook that pulls you towards a ledge.
raw.ability details: * Grappling Hook can be cancelled by pressing the jump key. * Grappling Hook can attach to Lifeweaver's [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]] and [[File:Tree_of_Life_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|Tree of Life]]. * Will attempt to go around fences and other breakables when grappling through them, but can break them if they are in the way.

abilities.name: Venom Mine

raw.shot type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
raw.damage:
25 per second
125 total
raw.duration:
Until replaced or destroyed (mine)
1.4 seconds (arming time)
5 seconds (poison)
raw.ability details: * Enemies who trigger the mine can be seen by Widowmaker through walls for a short time. * The venom effect is removed immediately upon taking a [[Health Pack]]. * If the ability is interrupted before cast time ends, the ability's cooldown will not trigger. * Does not stick to players, barriers or other [[deployables]]. * The projectile can be destroyed by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]] before it attaches to a surface. ** The reflected mine is non-functional; it explodes only if someone from Widowmaker's team walks directly on it, and it deals no damage. * Projectile is stopped by fences and other breakables, but it will not attach to them unless it has a walkable surface.

reload_time.raw: 1.5 seconds animation

raw.shot type: [[File:Icon-ability.tacticalvisor.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Hitscan|Hitscan ]] Hitscan
raw.reload time: 1.5 seconds animation
raw.ability details:
* Damage per second: 80 while firing (full charge) (70 overall w/reload)
* The base damage is 12 and scales linearly to 120. Each percent of power increases the damage by 1.08.
* The minimum power required to kill a full [[health]] target less than 50 meters away (without [[armor]]) with a single [[headshot]]:
** 175 HP: 54%
** 200 HP: 63%
** 225 HP: 73%
** 250 HP: 82%
** 275 HP: 91%
** 300 HP: 100%
* If fired with less than 50% power, the shots make a softer sound and leave a smaller trail.
* Jumping or using an ability interrupts ADS ("Aiming Down Sights" i.e. scoping) and charging, however it can be restarted right after even if still in air.

reload_time.raw: 1.5 seconds animation

raw.official description: Provide your team with a view of the enemy's location.
raw.ability details:
* Allows Widowmaker's entire team to see enemies through walls and their health bars.
* Infra-Sight only ends if Widowmaker is eliminated or once the duration runs out.
